title: スプリンターズSにむけて

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's finally time for the Sprinters Stakes. In
response to the videos she filmed during
training...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Curren Chan is receiving support from an entirely
different fan base from before!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But Curren Chan is racing against a formidable
opponent today... one who is also gaining
popularity on Umatter—Nishino Flower.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Curren Chan is determined to beat her and prove
that she is the cutest.
